title: BCRA Argentina — Monetary & FX Time Series (International Reserves, Official Exchange Rates, Policy/Reference Interest Rates)
source_org: Banco Central de la República Argentina (BCRA)
download_url: https://api.bcra.gob.ar/estadisticas/v4.0/monetarias/1 (Reservas internacionales) ; https://api.bcra.gob.ar/estadisticas/v4.0/monetarias/5 (Tipo de cambio mayorista de referencia) ; https://api.bcra.gob.ar/estadisticas/v4.0/monetarias/4 (Tipo de cambio minorista) ; https://api.bcra.gob.ar/estadisticas/v4.0/monetarias/160 (Tasas de interés de política monetaria) ; https://api.bcra.gob.ar/estadisticas/v4.0/monetarias/7 (Tasa de interés BADLAR de bancos privados) — all paginated with limit=3000&offset=N
time_coverage: reservas_internacionales (idVariable 1): daily 1996-01-03 to 2026-07-06 (7,510 obs); tipo_cambio_mayorista_referencia (idVariable 5, official wholesale/reference FX rate — the rate typically cited as 'the' official ARS/USD rate since the 2002 float): daily 2002-03-04 to 2026-07-08 (5,967 obs); tipo_cambio_minorista (idVariable 4, retail average selling rate): daily 2010-06-01 to 2026-07-08 (3,918 obs); tasa_interes_politica_monetaria (idVariable 160): daily 2015-12-16 to 2025-07-10 (2,329 obs); tasa_interes_badlar_bancos_privados (idVariable 7, long-running wholesale deposit reference rate, used as a proxy monetary-policy indicator before the 2015 policy-rate series existed): daily 1999-01-04 to 2026-07-07 (6,714 obs)
units: reservas: millions of USD; tipo de cambio: ARS per USD; tasas de interés: nominal annual percentage
license_terms: BCRA public statistics API (Estadísticas Monetarias v4.0 — v3.0 confirmed deprecated/HTTP 410 during this session, migrated to v4.0)
notes: Retrieved via BCRA's official public REST API (api.bcra.gob.ar/estadisticas/v4.0/monetarias/{idVariable}), paginated at limit=3000 per request. Full variable catalog (1,581 series) was fetched first to identify the correct idVariable codes; catalog itself not retained as a separate raw file (used only for discovery) — the five series above were selected as the core monetary/FX/reserves/rates set requested. PARALLEL/INFORMAL FX RATE: searched the full 1,581-series catalog for 'blue', 'paralelo', 'informal', 'MEP', 'CCL' (contado con liquidación) — BCRA's own official API does NOT publish an informal/parallel/blue-dollar rate, which is expected: the central bank only reports rates from its own regulated/official operations. A parallel-rate series (comparable to Iran's TGJU or Venezuela's dolartoday-style trackers) would need to come from an independent Argentine financial-media source (e.g. Ámbito Financiero, dolarhoy.com) and was NOT fabricated or substituted here — flagged as a gap for a future round if the project wants it. Estadísticas Cambiarias v1.0 (Cotizaciones endpoint) was also tested and returns current-day multi-currency reference rates but not a bulk historical download in one call.

failures.note: v3.0 of the Monetarias API is deprecated ('Método correspondiente a la v3 ha sido deprecado'); superseded by v4.0 which was used successfully.
